text: Scanpy preprocessing includes filtering of highly-variable genes, batch-effect correction, per-cell normalization, and preprocessing recipes.
source_excerpt: Filtering of highly-variable genes, batch-effect correction, per-cell normalization, preprocessing recipes.

text: Scanpy provides basic preprocessing functions including calculate_qc_metrics, filter_cells, filter_genes, highly_variable_genes, log1p, pca, and normalize_total.
